texto: Any local music scene at any point in time can be referred to as derivative of more well-known acts. The line separating influence from imitation is a blurry one. Very few artists are completely original; even great artists build upon what has occurred before, and add their personality and talent to create their own original expression.
explicacao: Citação de Stephen Tow sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Any local music scene at any point in time can be referred to as derivative of more well-known ac…” articula tempo, artists, expression em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como expression e grunge.
